files.Title: GRYLibrary.Core.Crypto.GRYBCryptoSystem
files.Summary: The is a cryptosystem to encrypt data with an optional masterkey to be able to decrypt the data without the password. The "B" in the name stands for "backdoor" since the masterpassword is obviously a backdoor. The purpose of this cryptosystem is to be able to encrypt data conformable to law when you have the requirement that a third party (and only this third party) must be able to decrypt the data.
